findings.control_reference: ISO 27001 A.8.5 / NIST IA-2 / SOC 2 CC6.1
findings.recommendation: Enable MFA for user admin-no-mfa immediately. Console access without MFA represents a critical authentication control gap.

findings.control_reference: ISO 27001 A.8.5 / NIST IA-2 / SOC 2 CC6.1
findings.recommendation: Enable MFA for user service-account-api. This service account lacks MFA — if credentials are compromised, API access to AWS resources is unprotected.
